commit_scope: Retune the fourth-arm carrier north-star to the current write floor and admit file-append to the fourth-arm manifest.

commands: coord claim "fourth-carrier-retune-file-append: retune substrate-carrier north-star to current write_file_text floor and test file-append manifest admission; avoid native-training, BML, witness, Android, HTTP/TLS lanes"
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh file-append write-file-text hostio-roundtrip let-effect-once eq-effect-once do-effect-seq
local_validation.notes: The focused gate returned PASS-4WAY for file-append, write-file-text, hostio-roundtrip, let-effect-once, eq-effect-once, and do-effect-seq. Full validation returned `fourth arm: 223 band(s) four-way` and `612 ok, 0 divergent`.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this fourth-arm carrier floor slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The structured carrier north-star now names write_file_text and file-append as supported fourth-arm write floors, and file-append is an explicit manifest row.
public_endpoints: n/a: local Form runtime manifest admission
test_flows: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh file-append write-file-text hostio-roundtrip let-effect-once eq-effect-once do-effect-seq

phase_gate.gate: The structured carrier north-star must match the manifest floor before file/Postgres carrier claims can move.
phase_gate.next: Continue the carrier arc with file_mtime, scan_run, segmented-file carrier receipts, or Postgres after CI merge.

retuned_north_star: write_file_text moved from unsupported to supported in fourth-arm-substrate-carriers.form
effect-once-let removed as a carrier blocker because current manifest already proves let-effect-once
next gate narrowed to file_mtime, scan_run, segmented-file carrier receipts, and Postgres
